title: Study Area – Greater Guayaquil
description: Bounding box covering approximately 7,908 km² of the Greater Guayaquil region used for the GEE analysis.

title: Mangrove Distribution Overview
description: Current mangrove distribution across the Guayaquil estuary showing green coverage areas.

title: Mangrove Change Detection (2015–2024)
description: Change detection map. Green = gain, Red = loss, Blue = water. Shows net mangrove dynamics over 9 years.

title: Mangrove Extent 2015 (Baseline)
description: Baseline mangrove coverage in 2015. Total area: 1,358 km².

title: Mangrove Extent 2024 (Current State)
description: Current mangrove coverage in 2024. Total area: 1,894 km². Net gain of 536 km² since 2015.

title: Mangrove Loss Hotspot Analysis
description: High-resolution hotspot map identifying areas of concentrated mangrove loss. Blue = water, Red = loss zones.

title: Mangrove Health Classification (2024)
description: NDVI-based health classification. Green = healthy (NDVI > 0.5), Yellow = moderate, Orange = stressed.

title: Flood Risk Classification Map
description: Flood risk scoring for the Guayaquil region. Green = Low, Orange = Moderate, Red = High, Purple = Critical.

title: Mangrove Protection Gap Analysis
description: Coastal protection coverage analysis. Green = mangrove-protected, Red = unprotected high-risk zones (~45% of coastline).

title: Population Exposure to Flood Risk
description: Population density overlaid with flood risk zones. Purple = critical exposure along Guayas delta river network.

title: Mangrove Loss Driving Flood Vulnerability
description: Areas where mangrove loss (red dots) directly drives increased flood vulnerability for communities.

title: Flood Risk After Mangrove Restoration
description: Simulated flood risk scenario after restoring mangroves to 2015 extent. Shows risk reduction across the delta.

title: Optimized Mangrove Expansion Strategy
description: Priority areas for mangrove expansion targeting maximum flood risk reduction for exposed communities.

title: Flood Risk Reduction from Mangrove Expansion
description: Projected risk reduction across Guayaquil region after full mangrove expansion strategy implementation.

title: Urban Expansion (2015–2024)
description: Urban growth in Greater Guayaquil. Magenta = new urban development. City area doubled from 243 to 496 km².

title: Mangrove Areas Converted to Urban Land
description: Areas where mangroves were directly converted to urban development. ~8.9 km² of direct ecological loss.

title: Urban Expansion into Flood-Prone Areas
description: New urban development (purple) overlapping critical flood zones — 115 km² of new urban in high-risk areas.

title: Urban Growth Overlapping Flood Risk Zones
description: Composite map of urban growth (magenta) against flood risk classification (blue). Shows compounding risk.

title: Mangrove Area Trend (2015–2024)
description: Time-series chart showing mangrove area over time — sharp decline to 2017 low, followed by partial recovery through 2024.

title: Mean NDVI Trend (2015–2024)
description: Average NDVI in mangrove-suitable zones over time. Dropped near zero around 2016–2017, recovering gradually after 2020.
